_note: 6mo-M1 #7 — SINGLE canonical source for tier APY/drawdown BAND label strings. Every surface (packages.astro, SiteHeader nav, index fallback) imports from here so the bands can never diverge (they did: SiteHeader said Preserve 6–8% while /packages said Conservative 2–6% — the 6–8% overstated the ~3.3% evidenced conservative book). The live per-tier APY NUMBER still comes dynamically from track_snapshot.packages / /api/tier1/packages; this file is the STATIC band-label + name-set source. The exact band VALUES remain owner-adjustable in ONE place (backlog #8, the canonical public APY definition); the alt_name set (Preserve/Core/Max-Yield) vs primary (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive) is owner choice #6. OWNER 2026-07-11: primary name set = Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive; APY display = "up to {max}%" (aggressive capped at up-to-20%); drawdown/tail budgets kept, real tails shown.

conservative.tail_en: Worst drawdown: realized to date (live paper track)
conservative.tail_ru: Макс. просадка: реализованная на сегодня (live paper-трек)

balanced.tail_en: Worst drawdown: ~4.5% (backtest, hedged sUSDe book) · budget ≤10%

aggressive.tail_en: Worst drawdown: up to ~50% (backtest, unhedged directional book) · budget ≤25%
aggressive.tail_ru: Макс. просадка: до ~50% (бэктест, нехедж. directional-книга) · бюджет ≤25%
